<meta name="description" content="Open-play dog daycare billed by the hour with no reservations. 6 locations across CA, TX, CO, and FL. Memberships from 5 hrs/month. Start with a free Good Fit Test." data-blog-meta="true">
<script>
(function(){
  var descs={
    '/blog/ultimate-guide-to-dog-daycare':'Everything you need to know about dog daycare in 2026. Learn costs, benefits, what to look for, and how Dogdrop makes drop-in daycare easy for busy pet parents.',
    '/blog/complete-guide-pet-care-franchises':'Explore the booming pet care franchise industry in 2026. Compare models, costs, ROI timelines, and discover why Dogdrop is the fastest-growing dog daycare franchise.',
    '/blog/how-much-does-dog-daycare-cost':'Dog daycare costs $25-$75 per day in 2026. See prices by city, compare packages, and learn how Dogdrop offers flexible drop-in pricing starting at $9/hour.',
    '/blog/how-to-start-dog-daycare-business':'Step-by-step guide to starting a dog daycare business in 2026. Covers licensing, location, hiring, launch strategy, and the Dogdrop franchise advantage.',
    '/blog/dog-daycare-vs-dog-walker-vs-pet-sitter':'Dog daycare vs dog walker vs pet sitter: compare costs, benefits, and which option is best for your dog. See how Dogdrop drop-in daycare offers the most flexibility.',
    '/blog/what-to-look-for-dog-daycare-checklist':'Complete checklist for choosing the best dog daycare. Evaluate staff, cleanliness, safety protocols, pricing, and more. See why Dogdrop sets the standard.',
    '/blog/is-dog-daycare-franchise-profitable':'Is a dog daycare franchise profitable? See real ROI numbers, profit margins, startup costs, and why Dogdrop is the top franchise opportunity in pet care.',
    '/blog/dog-daycare-near-me':'Find the best dog daycare near you. Compare facilities by city, learn what to look for, and discover Dogdrop locations in LA, Denver, Austin, Fort Lauderdale, and Anaheim.',
    '/blog':'Dogdrop Blog - Expert tips on dog daycare, pet care franchise opportunities, pricing guides, and everything you need to know about modern dog care.'
  };
  var p=window.location.pathname.replace(/\/$/,'');
  var d=descs[p];
  if(!d)return;
  var existing=document.querySelector('meta[name="description"]');
  if(existing){existing.setAttribute('content',d);}
  else{var m=document.createElement('meta');m.name='description';m.content=d;document.head.appendChild(m);}
})();
</script>

</script><!-- SnippetEnd: qLU_ajTnb --><!-- Snippet: vW31JvJLh --><script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "How does Dogdrop's hourly dog daycare work?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Dogdrop charges by the hour with no reservations required. Simply drop off your dog during operating hours and pick up when you're ready. You're billed only for the time your dog spends with us. First-time dogs need to pass a free Good Fit Test."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Do I need a reservation for Dogdrop?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "No. Dogdrop is a no-reservation, walk-in dog daycare. You can drop off your dog anytime during business hours without scheduling in advance."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What is a Good Fit Test at Dogdrop?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "The Good Fit Test is a free behavioral assessment for first-time dogs. Our team evaluates your dog's temperament and socialization skills to ensure they'll thrive in our open-play environment."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Where are Dogdrop locations?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Dogdrop has locations in Los Angeles (Arts District and Hollywood), Denver, Fort Lauderdale, Austin, Anaheim, and Jersey City, with additional locations coming soon in Dallas, Nashville, and more."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "How much does Dogdrop cost?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Dogdrop offers flexible memberships starting at 5 hours per month, as well as drop-in hourly rates. Pricing varies by location. Visit our pricing page or your local Dogdrop for current rates."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Is Dogdrop safe for my dog?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Yes. Dogdrop maintains trained staff-to-dog ratios, requires all dogs to pass a Good Fit Test, follows daily cleaning protocols, and uses open-play environments designed for safe socialization."
      }
    }
  ]
}
